program: National AI Data Center Grid (NDRC draft plan)
notes: DRAFT plan led by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC); ~2 trillion yuan (~$295B) over ~5 yr, national computing grid targeted for 2028, investment window through 2031. Funding is a MIX of sovereign debt, state funds, bank loans, and private investment, so the genuinely-public outlay vs private-mobilized split is unspecified (both left null, not summed). Mandates >=80% domestic hardware/software (incl. AI chips). State telecoms China Mobile/China Telecom to operate. Builds on 2022 'Eastern Data, Western Computing'. Not yet adopted -> low confidence. Reported by Bloomberg (2026-06-09); confirmed details via Crypto Briefing 2026-06-12.
